title: HLDA-ATAC ArchR Projects (Part 2)
author: Kim, Samuel H
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data repository for the Human Lung Development Atlas: 
 Preprint: https://doi.org/10.1101/2025.09.24.678382 
 Github: https://github.com/GreenleafLab/HLDA 
 This repository contains compressed ArchR Projects 
 Endothelial.tar.gz = Subclustered ArchR Project of all endothelial cells in dataset. Includes both ATAC peak counts matrix and RNA features counts matrix. 
 Stromal.tar.gz = Subclustered ArchR Project of all stromal cells in dataset. Includes both ATAC peak counts matrix and RNA features counts matrix.
